title: leucopogon huegelii
intro: Leucopogon huegelii, also known as the Blue Mountain peppermint or peppermint bush, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oils, which contain menthol and menthone, compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leucopogon huegelii include its use as a digestive aid, anti-inflammatory agent, and to relieve cold and flu symptoms. Leucopogon huegelii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and may also be used as a topical application for skin irritations and wounds.
